executives.name: Kirk Hachigian
executives.background: Mr. Hachigian is the Lead Independent Director of NextEra Energy. He is the retired chairman, president and CEO of JELD-WEN Holding, Inc. and former chairman and CEO of Cooper Industries plc.

executives.name: Pierre Breber
executives.background: Former Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. Retired in 2024.

executives.background: Former Chairman of BearingPoint, Inc. and former Co-Vice Chairman of KPMG LLP.
